testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.domain.playevent.PlayEventControllerTest

testcase.name: POST count is per-ad — different ads are isolated()
POST STARTED returns 201 and persists a row()
POST without occurredAt accepts and server stamps now()
POST returns 400 when eventType is unknown()
POST returns 400 when adId is missing()
POST FINISHED also persists and coexists with STARTED rows()
repository count aggregates only the requested event type()
POST returns 400 when adId is blank()
POST FINISHED returns post-increment server daily count()
